2317990.name: Fantasy Grounds - Book of Lost Spells
2317990.description:
Book of Lost Spells

Ask any wizard. There's no such thing as too many spells. This massive compendium of magical mayhem ought to satisfy even the most discerning necromancers and thaumaturgists, and they aren't easy to please (especially the necromancers). Weighing in with a total of 708 spells, the Book of Lost Spells is a vital resources for anyone wanting to add a bit more mystery to the magic of Pathfinder!
Get even more for your game! Frog God Games makes adventures and supplements for Fifth Edition, Swords & Wizardry, Pathfinder and more!
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Connor Bates
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included Pathfinder RPG and D&D 3.5/ OGL ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
